'''鈭歫-f-sh''' ('''kajafash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbless|unbless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbless|unbless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kajafash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafash|thijafash]] || [[word:jijafash|jijafash]] || [[word:shijafash|shijafash]] || [[word:kijafash|kijafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafash|thuthujafash]] || [[word:jujujafash|jujujafash]] || [[word:shushujafash|shushujafash]] || [[word:kukujafash|kukujafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafash|thujafash]] || [[word:jujafash|jujafash]] || [[word:shujafash|shujafash]] || [[word:kujafash|kujafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujafash|thujafash]] || [[word:jujafash|jujafash]] || [[word:shujafash|shujafash]] || [[word:kujafash|kujafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejafash|thejafash]] || [[word:jejafash|jejafash]] || [[word:shejafash|shejafash]] || [[word:kejafash|kejafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojafash|thothojafash]] || [[word:jojojafash|jojojafash]] || [[word:shoshojafash|shoshojafash]] || [[word:kokojafash|kokojafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafash|thojafash]] || [[word:jojafash|jojafash]] || [[word:shojafash|shojafash]] || [[word:kojafash|kojafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafash|thojafash]] || [[word:jojafash|jojafash]] || [[word:shojafash|shojafash]] || [[word:kojafash|kojafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jafash|th忙jafash]] || [[word:j忙jafash|j忙jafash]] || [[word:sh忙jafash|sh忙jafash]] || [[word:k忙jafash|k忙jafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafash|thathajafash]] || [[word:jajajafash|jajajafash]] || [[word:shashajafash|shashajafash]] || [[word:kakajafash|kakajafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafash|thajafash]] || [[word:jajafash|jajafash]] || [[word:shajafash|shajafash]] || [[word:kajafash|kajafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajafash|thajafash]] || [[word:jajafash|jajafash]] || [[word:shajafash|shajafash]] || [[word:kajafash|kajafash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajafash|shajafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajafash|goshajafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajafash|gokishajafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajafashn眉|shajafashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajafashnkn眉|goshajafashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafashn眉|gokishajafashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajafash毛|shajafash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajafashnksh毛|goshajafashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajafash毛|gokishajafash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafashro|shajafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafashnkro|goshajafashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafashro|gokishajafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafashmu|shajafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafashnkmu|goshajafashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafashmu|gokishajafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajafasher|shajafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajafashnksher|goshajafashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajafasher|gokishajafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajafashng|shajafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajafashnkng|goshajafashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajafashng|gokishajafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajafashya|shajafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajafashnkya|goshajafashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajafashya|gokishajafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajafashyam|shajafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajafashnkyam|goshajafashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajafashyam|gokishajafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafashn眉sh毛|shajafashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafashnkn眉sh毛|goshajafashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafashn眉sh毛|gokishajafashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafashn眉ro|shajafashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafashnkn眉ro|goshajafashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafashn眉ro|gokishajafashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafashn眉mu|shajafashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafashnkn眉mu|goshajafashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafashn眉mu|gokishajafashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafash毛n眉|shajafash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafashnksh毛n眉|goshajafashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafash毛n眉|gokishajafash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafash毛ro|shajafash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafashnksh毛ro|goshajafashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafash毛ro|gokishajafash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafash毛mu|shajafash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafashnksh毛mu|goshajafashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafash毛mu|gokishajafash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafashron眉|shajafashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafashnkron眉|goshajafashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafashron眉|gokishajafashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafashrosh毛|shajafashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafashnkrosh毛|goshajafashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafashrosh毛|gokishajafashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafashromu|shajafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafashnkromu|goshajafashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafashromu|gokishajafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafashmun眉|shajafashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafashnkmun眉|goshajafashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafashmun眉|gokishajafashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafashmush毛|shajafashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafashnkmush毛|goshajafashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafashmush毛|gokishajafashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafashmuro|shajafashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafashnkmuro|goshajafashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafashmuro|gokishajafashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
